title: Expo a whole lot of fun
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - On the whole, the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - On the whole, the weather has been good this weekend, which has played a role in ensuring the success of the Garden Route Family Expo.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - On the whole, the weather has been good this weekend, which has played a role in ensuring the success of the Garden Route Family Expo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The expo was at Bartelsfontein Farm, on the R327 outside Mossel Bay. There has been a good turnout of people over the weekend.","html":"The expo was at Bartelsfontein Farm, on the R327 outside Mossel Bay. There has been a good turnout of people over the weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Families and their pets enjoyed fun in the sun.","html":"Families and their pets enjoyed fun in the sun."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There was more entertainment than ever before for the children, especially.","html":"There was more entertainment than ever before for the children, especially."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An attractive line-up of singers and musicians kept everyone entertained.","html":"An attractive line-up of singers and musicians kept everyone entertained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See a gallery here:","html":"See a gallery here:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"https://tinyurl.com/mry3dns7","html":"https://tinyurl.com/mry3dns7"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See a video below:","html":"See a video below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""}]

images.alt: Expo a whole lot of fun
